returns._0: The balance of this paymaster in the EntryPoint

returns.timeRemaining: Seconds remaining, or 0 if ready/no pending

returns.ready: True if withdrawal can be executed

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params: - Actual fee per gas (unused, reserved for future use)
params.actualGasCost: Actual gas cost of the operation
params.mode: The post-op mode (success, reverted, or postOpReverted)

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

setMaxOpsPerUser(uint256).details: Only callable by owner. Used for rate limiting.

params.maxOps: The maximum number of operations per user per day

setSigner(address).details: Only callable by owner. Emits SignerUpdated event.

setTenantLimit(bytes32,uint256).details: Only callable by owner. Set to 0 for unlimited.

params.limit: The daily limit in wei (0 = unlimited)

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params.maxCost: Maximum gas cost to be paid
params.userOp: The packed user operation to validate

returns.validationData: Packed validation data with time range

withdrawTo(address,uint256).details: Legacy function - deprecated, use requestWithdraw + executeWithdraw

deposit().notice: Deposit ETH to EntryPoint for gas sponsorship

executeWithdraw().notice: Execute a pending withdrawal after timelock expires

getDeposit().notice: Get current deposit balance in EntryPoint

getWithdrawTimeRemaining().notice: Get the time remaining until withdrawal can be executed

isWithdrawReady().notice: Check if a withdrawal is ready to execute

postOp(uint8,bytes,uint256,uint256).notice: Post-operation handler called after user operation execution

senderNonces(address).notice: Per-sender nonces for replay prevention (replaces unbounded usedSignatures)

setMaxOpsPerUser(uint256).notice: Set the maximum operations per user per day

setTenantLimit(bytes32,uint256).notice: Set the daily spending limit for a tenant

validatePaymasterUserOp((address,uint256.notice: Validate a user operation for sponsorship

verifyingSigner().notice: Authorized signer for validating paymaster sponsorship data

withdrawTo(address,uint256).notice: This function is kept for interface compatibility but reverts
